reference: My boyfriend and I were treated for chlamydia on Monday, and we did not vomit the antibiotics. It is Wednesday now, and we had sex using a condom. Is this okay? I am really nervous that we could get re-infected. I will contact the health unit, but will we be okay?
text: More recently than I would think it's a pretty long number, and you did not allow me to answer that. It is Wednesday now, and you don't expect to be able to find me. Is this okay? I'm really, really nervous that you could get me infected. I have a contact to talk to you, but it's really the other way around.
